text_excerpt: Contact - Rachel Taylor MP Skip to main content Rachel Taylor MP Rachel Taylor Labour MP for North Warwickshire and Bedworth Join Get Involved Donate About HS2 Get involved Monthly newsletter Contact News My views Surgeries and events More Menu Contact I hold surgeries, events, and public meetings regularly across the constituency. Click here to see the full schedule. I will not tolerate harassment or abusive conduct against me or my staff. Click here to read my Unacceptable Behaviour Policy.
